---
title: "Field Gallery"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-shell">
  <section class="section-block">
    <h2 class="section-title">Field Notes in Images</h2>
    <div class="gallery-grid">
      <figure class="gallery-card wide">
        <img src="ifr%20meeting.jpg" alt="Leading Individual Forest Rights Awareness Meeting in Jalgaon.">
        <figcaption>Leading Individual Forest Rights Awareness Meeting in Jalgaon</figcaption>
      </figure>

      <figure class="gallery-card narrow">
        <img src="cfr%20stakeholder%20meeting.JPG" alt="Observing a Community Forest Rights Meeting in Jalgaon.">
        <figcaption>Observing a Community Forest Rights Meeting in Jalgaon</figcaption>
      </figure>

      <figure class="gallery-card narrow">
        <img src="APSA%20Vancouver.jpeg" alt="Presenting at APSA 2025 Vancouver.">
        <figcaption>Presenting at APSA 2025 Vancouver</figcaption>
      </figure>

      <figure class="gallery-card wide">
        <img src="survey%20dhule.jpg" alt="Enumerator Training in Dhule.">
        <figcaption>Enumerator Training in Dhule</figcaption>
      </figure>

      <figure class="gallery-card wide">
        <img src="ifr%20survey%202.jpg" alt="Organizing community-led enumeration of Individual Forest Rights in Nandurbar.">
        <figcaption>Organizing Community-Led Enumeration of Individual Forest Rights in Nandurbar</figcaption>
      </figure>

      <figure class="gallery-card narrow">
        <img src="felicitation%20collage.jpg" alt="Being felicitated by tribal leaders before embarking on PhD research.">
        <figcaption>Being felicitated by tribal leaders before embarking on PhD research</figcaption>
      </figure>

      <figure class="gallery-card narrow">
        <img src="protest.jpg" alt="Observing Adivasi Forest Land Rights Movement in Sakri.">
        <figcaption>Observing Adivasi Forest Land Rights Movement, Sakri</figcaption>
      </figure>

      <figure class="gallery-card wide">
        <img src="river.jpg" alt="The tranquility of the Narmada Valley.">
        <figcaption>The Tranquility of the Narmada Valley</figcaption>
      </figure>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>
```
